text: [{"choices": [{"finish_reason": "stop", "index": 0, "logprobs": null, "message": {"annotations": null, "audio": null, "content": "[{\"bbox\": [607, 71, 958, 375], \"category\": \"Text\", \"text\": \"RELACION\\nDE LOS RESO-\\nNAMIENTOS OVE\\nhan tenido el Code de Oli.\\nuares,yMarques delos Veles\\ny demas Generales del Rey\\nde Castilla,que han veni-\\ndo contra Caraluna.\"}, {\"bbox\": [607, 385, 954, 643], \"category\": \"Picture\"}, {\"bbox\": [607, 592, 954, 643], \"category\": \"Text\", \"text\": \"Con licencia; en Barcelona en cafe de Iayme Ma-\\nteyatano 1642,\"}, {\"bbox\": [1016, 54, 1041, 82], \"category\": \"Page-footer\", \"text\": \"26\"}, {\"bbox\": [643, 721, 664, 735], \"category\": \"Page-footer\", \"text\": \"112\"}]", "function_call": null, "reasoning": null, "refusal": null, "role": "assistant", "tool_calls": []}, "stop_reason": 151673, "token_ids": null}], "created": 1775549071, "id": "chatcmpl-addab400c6964044", "kv_transfer_params": null, "model": "davanstrien/dots.ocr-1.5", "object": "chat.completion", "prompt_logprobs": null, "prompt_token_ids": null, "service_tier": null, "system_fingerprint": null, "usage": {"completion_tokens": 256, "prompt_tokens": 1421, "prompt_tokens_details": null, "total_tokens": 1677}}]
